name: Artichoke Tomato Alfredo
recipeIngredient: 1 can artichokes, juice reserved, cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Toss the chopped artichokes and their juice into a pan.
2. Thicken with flour and milk to desired thickness.
3. Add the onion, mushrooms, tomatoes, and basil. Cook for a short time, leaving vegetables firm and tasty.
4. Cook your favorite spaghetti noodles and rinse them.
5. Toss the artichoke sauce over the cooked pasta.
